selectedPatterns.title: Tiered context loading -> bounded context blocks
selectedPatterns.reusablePattern: Keep extracted context in small, explicitly budgeted blocks that are loaded only when the gate says signal quality is high enough.
selectedPatterns.minimalMissionControlUse: Validate a bounded OpenViking decision artifact instead of adding OpenViking runtime dependencies to the main dispatch path.
evidence: - **Tiered Context Loading** → **Reduces Token Consumption**: L0/L1/L2 three-tier structure, loaded on demand, significantly saving costs.
### 2. Tiered Context Loading → Reduces Token Consumption

selectedPatterns.title: Retrieval trajectory observability -> explicit reason-coded diagnostics
selectedPatterns.reusablePattern: Every bounded context experiment should emit machine-readable decision codes so operators can tell whether it was skipped, degraded, or accepted.
selectedPatterns.minimalMissionControlUse: Emit a small JSON artifact with decision, rationale, rollback notes, and stable measurement fields.
evidence: - **Visualized Retrieval Trajectory** → **Observable Context**: Supports visualization of directory retrieval trajectories, allowing users to clearly observe the root cause of issues and guide retrieval logic optimization.

tokenCostDeltaEstimated.note: Estimated against a naive direct-import of longer OpenViking references into Mission Control context. Negative means bounded extraction is cheaper.

reliabilityDeltaEstimated.note: Reason-coded bounded artifacts improve operator observability while avoiding runtime coupling to an additional context service.

operationalComplexityDeltaEstimated.note: This spike adds one script and one decision doc only; no new daemon, database, or adapter dependency is enabled in production paths.

decision.rationale: The two reusable patterns are worth keeping, but OpenViking itself remains too large and operationally heavy for active Mission Control dependency status in this bounded run.
rollbackNotes: Delete scripts/run-openviking-bounded-spike.ts if the bounded spike is no longer useful.
Delete docs/OPENVIKING_BOUNDED_SPIKE.md and remove pilot references from docs if OpenViking is fully discarded.
No runtime rollback needed because no production integration path was enabled.
